research_goals: find papers on human feedback loops in literature search
identify methods suitable for iterative approval workflows
constraints: include both systems and evaluation papers

must_cover: core papers on human-in-the-loop scholarly search
query variants that reflect both automation and approval-loop language
must_avoid: papers included only because they are recent or popular
candidate sets that reflect only one expected conclusion
selection_principles: use more than one scholarly source when available
justify every included candidate with abstract-level evidence
prefer papers that can support downstream gap analysis
stop_conditions: candidate set is focused enough for researcher review
queries cover more than one angle of the research topic

notes: Initial search draft for the first approval round.
